W1.name: W1
W1.applicableDaysText:
Monday to Friday
 Mondays to Fridays
W1.seasonalVariationsHtml:
GWR Christmas and New Year Travel Restrictions 2025/26

Up to and including Friday 19 December: Usual ticket restrictions apply.

Monday 22 to Wednesday 24 December:

Off-Peak tickets valid all day.

Super Off-Peak tickets subject to normal restriction times.

Monday 29 December to Friday 02 January * No ticket restrictions apply.

Monday 05 January 2026 onwards Usual ticket restrictions apply.

Journey planners have been updated with the above information.

*Please note this only applies to journeys priced by GWR. Flows within Wales, between Cheltenham and Gloucester and long-distance routes to areas not served by GWR are priced by other train companies, who may have different Christmas travel restrictions in place. Usual restrictions will apply to CPAY and may apply to other Operators’ services. Please check retail systems if unsure.

Customers using Off-Peak travel cards and arriving at London Paddington before 09:30 on weekdays, will need to wait until 09:30 for onward travel from Paddington.

restrictions.outwardHtml:
Valid on West Midlands Railway/London Northwestern Railway services only.

This code is applied to a temporary single ticket called Anytime Advance available for sale up to 3 days before travel and which can be used at anytime for the date and journey shown on the ticket.

Monday to Friday
 Mondays to Fridays
WH.notesHtml:
Restriction code WO applies to all journeys via Newbury or Didcot Parkway, not passing through Reading.

Restriction code Q8 applies to all journeys via Fareham / Southampton / Salisbury.

Restriction codes 7E /9J apply to all journeys via L
WH.notesText:
Restriction code WO applies to all journeys via Newbury or Didcot Parkway, not passing through Reading.
 Restriction code Q8 applies to all journeys via Fareham / Southampton / Salisbury.
 Restriction codes 7E / 9J apply to all journeys via L
WH.seasonalVariationsHtml:
GWR Christmas and New Year Travel Restrictions 2025/26

Up to and including Friday 19 December: Usual ticket restrictions apply.

Monday 22 to Wednesday 24 December:

Off-Peak tickets valid all day.

Super Off-Peak tickets subject to normal restriction times.

Monday 29 December to Friday 02 January * No ticket restrictions apply.

Monday 05 January 2026 onwards Usual ticket restrictions apply.

Journey planners have been updated with the above information.

*Please note this only applies to journeys priced by GWR. Flows within Wales, between Cheltenham and Gloucester and long-distance routes to areas not served by GWR are priced by other train companies, who may have different Christmas travel restrictions in place. Usual restrictions will apply to CPAY and may apply to other Operators’ services. Please check retail systems if unsure.

Customers using Off-Peak travel cards and arriving at London Paddington before 09:30 on weekdays, will need to wait until 09:30 for onward travel from Paddington.

WM.name: Chiltern Off-Peak (From West Midlands)
WM.seasonalVariationsHtml:
Ticket restrictions will be lifted as follows:

  • Friday 3rd to Monday 6th April 2026
  • Monday 4th May 2026
  • Monday 25th May 2026
  • Monday 31st August 2026
  • Thursday 24th December 2026 to Friday 1st January 2027

Off-Peak Day Travelcards and Family Travelcards are only valid on Transport for London services from 09:30 Mondays to Fridays. They are valid at any time at weekends and on public holidays.

WP.name: WP
WP.applicableDaysText:
Monday to Friday
 Mondays to Fridays
WP.notesHtml:
Super Off-Peak tickets from stations not listed are valid for connections into trains departing as shown above.

Restriction code 2W applies to all journeys via Newbury or Didcot Parkway, not passing through Reading.Restriction codeQ8 applies to all journeys via Fareham / Southampton / Salisbury.Restriction codesCI /CJ apply to all journeys via London St Pancras International.Restriction codes2C /9I apply to all journeys via London Euston.
WP.notesText:
Super Off-Peak tickets from stations not listed are valid for connections into trains departing as shown above.
 Restriction code 2W applies to all journeys via Newbury or Didcot Parkway, not passing through Reading.Restriction code Q8 applies to all journeys via Fareham / Southampton / Salisbury.Restriction codes CI / CJ apply to all journeys via London St Pancras International.Restriction codes 2C / 9I apply to all journeys via London Euston.
WP.seasonalVariationsHtml:
GWR Christmas and New Year Travel Restrictions 2025/26

Up to and including Friday 19 December: Usual ticket restrictions apply.

Monday 22 to Wednesday 24 December:

Off-Peak tickets valid all day.

Super Off-Peak tickets subject to normal restriction times.

Monday 29 December to Friday 02 January * No ticket restrictions apply.

Monday 05 January 2026 onwards Usual ticket restrictions apply.

Journey planners have been updated with the above information.

*Please note this only applies to journeys priced by GWR. Flows within Wales, between Cheltenham and Gloucester and long-distance routes to areas not served by GWR are priced by other train companies, who may have different Christmas travel restrictions in place. Usual restrictions will apply to CPAY and may apply to other Operators’ services. Please check retail systems if unsure.

Customers using Off-Peak travel cards and arriving at London Paddington before 09:30 on weekdays, will need to wait until 09:30 for onward travel from Paddington.

restrictions.outwardHtml:
Not valid for travel on trains timed to depart after 04:29 and before the times shown from the following stations:

  • 08:15 from St Germans;
  • 08:25 from Saltash;
  • 08:20 from Plymouth;
  • 08:49 from Ivybridge;
  • 08:45 from Totnes;
  • 09:00 from Newton Abbot;
  • 09:20 from Exeter St Davids;

Not valid on trains timed to arrive at Waterloo before 11:48.
restrictions.returnHtml:
Not valid on trains timed to depart:

  • London Paddington after 04:29 and before 10:10 and after 15:04 until 19:01;
  • Reading after 04:29 and before 10:30 and after 15:29 until 19:01;
  • London Waterloo after 04:29 and before 08:15 and after 15:59 until 19:01;
  • Clapham Junction after 04:29 and before 07:21 and after 15:59 until 19:01.
